scripts.k6:local-ramp:dashboard: pnpm bundle && K6_WEB_DASHBOARD=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_OPEN=true K6_WEB_DASHBOARD_EXPORT=dist/k6-local-ramp-report.html k6 run dist/k6-local-ramp.js
scripts.k6:ci-smoke: pnpm bundle && TARGET_RPS=1000 PRE_ALLOCATED_VUS=200 MAX_VUS=1000 k6 run --summary-mode=full --summary-trend-stats='avg,min,med,p(90),p(95),p(99),max' dist/k6-local-ramp.js
